problem: Can protein structure be predicted from sequence in real time without AlphaFold compute cost?
hypothesis: If Quantum annealing for optimization problems is applied to alphafold, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Hardware prototype with 3 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: To know that you do not know is the best. — Lao Tzu
